triggers.description: Whenever this creature enters or transforms into CARDNAME, mill three cards. Then if there is an Elf card in your graveyard, you gain 2 life.
Whenever this creature enters or transforms into CARDNAME, mill three cards. Then if there is an Elf card in your graveyard, you gain 2 life.
At the beginning of your first main phase, you may pay {B}. If you do, transform NICKNAME.
Whenever this creature transforms into CARDNAME, mill three cards, then you may exile an Elf card from your graveyard. If you do, each opponent loses 2 life.
At the beginning of your first main phase, you may pay {G}. If you do, transform NICKNAME.
